redaction_note: Redacted real-ish local chat requirement; no secrets or full private transcript.
summary: Huan wants local window distillation to feed the Qianxuesen learning loop without using Zilliz as the default intake proxy.
setpoint: use local distilled windows as learning input before candidate generation

turns.speaker: huan
turns.text: Add window distillation into the Qianxuesen loop and keep it local instead of using a Zilliz proxy.

turns.speaker: codex
turns.text: The distiller should create a compact learning event first, then the existing local candidate queue can handle it.
